notes: Editorial primitive extracted from a media artefact; tagged-union counterpart to Observation (owl:disjointWith). skos:altLabel "Candidate" per runtime naming. BFO: iao:InformationContentEntity.
Data primitive from Distribution ingestion — fully-resolved data point. Thin in V0; no CQs hit it yet (deferred full treatment to data-ingest lane). iao:InformationContentEntity.

Thin class in V0: IRI + rdfs:label + optional rdfs:comment. Seven-facet identity from Linear D2 deferred to V1. skos:altLabel "CanonicalMeasurementSeries" for agentology continuity. iao:InformationContentEntity.
Thin class in V0: IRI + rdfs:label. Per SKY-316: ei:implementsVariable exactly 1 + ei:publishedInDataset max 1. iao:InformationContentEntity.
Social-media post (Bluesky at:// or Twitter x://). authoredBy exactly 1 Expert; inConversation max 1 SocialThread. iao:Document subclass.
Abstract supertype for chart/screenshot/excerpt/image payloads attached to a Post. iao:Document subclass.
Data visualisation — bar/line/pie chart embedded in a post. Subclass of MediaAttachment.
Screenshot of external content (news article, report, external post, PDF). Subclass of MediaAttachment. Carries ei:screenshotOf → xsd:anyURI.
Quoted text block from an external source (pull-quote, transcribed report snippet). Subclass of MediaAttachment. Carries ei:excerptFrom → xsd:anyURI.
Generic image (photo, diagram, logo). Subclass of MediaAttachment. Thin catch-all for attachments that are not Chart/Screenshot/Excerpt.
Abstract supertype: unit of media with multi-participant exchange. Subtypes: SocialThread, PodcastEpisode. iao:InformationContentEntity.
Reply-tree of Posts on Bluesky or Twitter. Conversation subclass. Posts within are linked via ei:repliesTo (partial order, not ordered list).
Audio recording composed of ordered PodcastSegments. Conversation subclass.
Timestamped portion of a PodcastEpisode. partOf exactly 1 PodcastEpisode; spokenBy 0..n Expert. Carries ei:hasSegmentIndex xsd:integer for ordering.
Person with public energy discourse; DID-based identity. Strict foaf:Person subclass in V0 (no team / bot accounts).
Institutional actor (agency, publisher, data provider). Dual parent: rdfs:subClassOf foaf:Organization + rdfs:subClassOf bfo:ObjectAggregate. Role-bearer for PublisherRole + DataProviderRole.
bfo:Role borne by Organization when it publishes content (news, analysis, editorial).
bfo:Role borne by Organization when it publishes data distributions (EIA, Ember, NESO, ...).
Range of ei:assertedTime. Attributes: ei:intervalStart (xsd:date|xsd:dateTime), ei:intervalEnd (0..1), rdfs:label (surface form like "2025 YTD").
Root for Organization + Person in FOAF.
Superclass of Expert.
Superclass of ei:Organization.
Co-parent of ei:Organization (BFO 2020 category for institutional wholes).
Superclass of Post and all MediaAttachment subclasses.
Superclass of CMC, Observation, Variable, Series, PodcastEpisode, PodcastSegment, Conversation.
Applied to CMC (prov lineage of produced artefacts).
Future ABox: extraction / resolution events; referenced via prov:wasGeneratedBy annotation on CMC in V0.
Range for ei:aboutTechnology. Wide enough to accommodate OEO classes once imported (via OWL 2 punning).
Future: ei:assertedUnit canonical normalisation target.
Conceptual collection; has 1..n Distributions. Full DCAT fidelity.
Specific access point (CSV, API, PDF, landing page).
Curated collection of Dataset metadata.
Per-catalog entry about a Dataset (distinct from Dataset itself, per Linear D5).
API described as a service; linked from Distribution.accessService.
Recurring Dataset releases (Form 860 2023, 2024, 2025). Note: distinct from ei:Series.
Domain: (Post ∪ MediaAttachment ∪ PodcastSegment). Range: CanonicalMeasurementClaim. CMC invariant: ≥1 evidencing artefact (CQ-009).
Domain: Post. Range: Expert. Cardinality: exactly 1.
Domain: Post. Range: MediaAttachment (widened from Chart). Cardinality: 0..n.
Domain: Post. Range: SocialThread. Cardinality: 0..1 (not every post is threaded).
Domain: Post. Range: Post. Cardinality: 0..1. Defines the reply partial-order within a SocialThread.
Domain: PodcastSegment. Range: Expert. Cardinality: 0..n.
Domain: PodcastSegment. Range: PodcastEpisode. Cardinality: exactly 1.
Domain: PodcastSegment. Range: xsd:integer. Cardinality: 0..1 (ordering hint within an Episode).
Domain: Screenshot. Range: xsd:anyURI. Cardinality: 0..1. URL of external content captured.
Domain: Excerpt. Range: xsd:anyURI. Cardinality: 0..1.

Abstract super-property over the five ei:references* properties below. Domain: CanonicalMeasurementClaim. Range: owl:Thing. Not asserted on individuals directly; used for generic CMC-has-any-reference queries.
Domain: CMC. Range: ei:Organization. Cardinality: 0..1. rdfs:subPropertyOf ei:references.
Domain: CMC. Range: dcat:Distribution. Cardinality: 0..1. rdfs:subPropertyOf ei:references.
Domain: CMC. Range: dcat:Dataset. Cardinality: 0..1. rdfs:subPropertyOf ei:references.
Domain: CMC. Range: ei:Variable. Cardinality: 0..1. rdfs:subPropertyOf ei:references.
Domain: CMC. Range: ei:Series. Cardinality: 0..1. rdfs:subPropertyOf ei:references.

Domain: CMC. Range: skos:Concept. Cardinality: 0..n. Claim-level technology / topic classification. Range widens to the imported OEO subtree in a later phase (see scope.md § Open questions #1). Moved from Variable-facet-level (Linear D2) to claim-level per 2026-04-22 interview.
Domain: Series. Range: Variable. Cardinality: exactly 1. Matches SKY-316 in sevocab.
Domain: Series. Range: dcat:Dataset. Cardinality: 0..1 in V0. Inverse of ei:hasSeries.
Inverse of ei:publishedInDataset. Domain: dcat:Dataset. Range: Series.
Domain: CMC. Range: rdfs:Datatype = (xsd:decimal ∪ xsd:string). 0..1.
Domain: CMC. Range: xsd:string (surface token like 'GW', 'TWh') in V0. Canonical qudt:Unit linkage deferred to later phase.
Domain: CMC. Range: ei:ClaimTemporalWindow. Cardinality: 0..1.
Domain: ClaimTemporalWindow. Range: xsd:date | xsd:dateTime. Cardinality: 0..1.
Domain: ClaimTemporalWindow. Range: xsd:date | xsd:dateTime. Cardinality: 0..1.
Domain: CMC. Range: xsd:string. Surface text (chart title, post-text fragment, screenshot caption).
Domain: CMC. Range: xsd:string (JSON literal encoding key-value dims). Cardinality: 0..1.
Applied as an annotation property to CMC recording the extraction activity IRI. Full prov:Activity individuals deferred to ABox phase.
Used on CanonicalMeasurementClaim ("Candidate") and Variable ("CanonicalMeasurementSeries") for cross-codebase naming continuity.
For alias relations per Linear D4 (plus closeMatch, broadMatch, narrowMatch). 'methodologyVariant' extension deferred.
